_meta.purpose: Live-verified source provenance captured during the Phase 13 root-cause investigation. Every entry was individually WebFetched/probed on 2026-06-15/16 for the freelance Linux/Platform/SRE/DevOps EU-remote lane and observed live + lane-relevant. This file is PROVENANCE for the curated seeds baked into ultramode-sources.md by the Phase 13 build. It is NOT a substitute for the never-fabricate invariant: every seed is re-probed live at resolution time before admission to a workspace sources.json.
_meta.lane: freelance/contract platform-engineering, SRE, Linux infra; base NL; EU/UK + remote; EUR 750/day floor

ats_seed._note: Keyless per-company ATS boards. provider+slug resolve a JSON endpoint. Used to bootstrap the ATS watchlist when companies_to_target is empty. EACH is re-probed (HTTP 200 + jobs>0 + identity check) before admission. freelance_friendly is false across the board (ATS = permanent-heavy) — value is lane coverage, contract filtering happens at sweep time.

endpoint_patterns.workable: https://apply.workable.com/api/v3/accounts/<slug>/jobs (authoritative pattern per ultramode-sources.md resolver table; an alternate v1 widget endpoint https://apply.workable.com/api/v1/widget/accounts/<slug>?details=true also exists — reconcile against a live probe before seeding a workable-provider company; no current ATS seed uses workable)

entries.note: Strongest single board for Linux/remote. Fully remote employer.
Remote-first observability; explicit |UK|Remote, |Spain|Remote, |Ireland|Remote tags.
All-remote; strong SRE/platform density. (Ashby slug 404'd — Greenhouse is the live lane.)
Only board hitting IAM/IDM directly: 'Associate IAM Specialist', 'IDM Analyst', 'Sr SRE - Access Team'. EU fintech.
Observability vendor; EMEA/remote openings.
Amsterdam NL fintech; office/hybrid. Proves Greenhouse resolves for a flagship NL employer.
Distributed/remote-first. Some matches PM-flavoured.
Amsterdam marketplace. Also lists a freelancer-network posting (engages freelancers).
Dusseldorf DACH; 'DevOps Infrastructure Engineer', 'Systems Engineer'.
Remote-friendly platform vendor. (Ashby slug 200 but 0 jobs/stale — prefer the populated provider.)
NL payments scale-up. Greenhouse/Lever 404'd — Ashby is correct provider.
Amsterdam crypto exchange. Second NL employer on Ashby keyless lane.
Greenhouse slug 200 but 0 jobs — Ashby populated. Demonstrates empty-vs-populated provider distinction.
Keyless SmartRecruiters lane; 'Platform Engineer - Database Platform [London]'. UK-eligible.

freelance_marketplace_seed._note: The category the freelance-only user most needs, and the one the engine returned at zero. login_walled => extension lane (retained, not dropped — Gate A must recognise the wall). public => html lane, client-side filter.

entries.name: Malt
entries.note: Largest EU freelance marketplace (NL/BE/FR/DE/Nordics/ES/CH/UK). Explicitly recognised for DevOps/SRE freelancers. Direct search 403s bots → extension lane.

entries.name: YunoJuno
entries.note: UK+EU contractor marketplace, IR35/compliance focus, pays 165+ countries. Briefs behind login.

entries.name: Worksome
entries.note: Danish-origin FMS+marketplace UK/EU/Nordics. B2B; login-walled.

entries.name: Toptal
entries.note: Global freelance network incl. DevOps/Cloud/infra. /freelance-jobs 403s bots → extension lane (probe-blocked, not fabricated).

entries.name: Lemon.io
entries.note: EU/LatAm/US contract-dev marketplace; lists K8s/Terraform/AWS engineers. Job feed behind me.lemon.io login.

entries.name: A.Team
entries.note: Senior independent builders, at-scale production focus. No public board; /join login.

entries.name: Andela
entries.note: Global remote talent network; K8s/Docker/AWS platform work, EU participation. talent.andela.com login.

entries.name: Proxify
entries.note: European long-term remote contract network, hires DevOps. /jobs 403 Cloudflare → extension (probe-blocked, not fabricated).

entries.name: Braintrust
entries.note: PUBLICLY readable. 'IT & Infra 560+' category; 'DevOps/Cloud Architect $140-190/hr' contract listing — in the user's rate ballpark. User-owned network, zero talent fees.

entries.name: hackajob
entries.note: PUBLICLY readable. SRE/Platform/Infra/SRE roles (Barclays, JPMorgan). 'hackajob on-demand' contractor lane. UK/EU focus.

entries.name: Gun.io
entries.note: PUBLICLY readable remote contract marketplace. US-centric, invite/vetted; infra roles intermittent.

entries.name: IT-Contracts.nl
entries.note: PUBLICLY readable. Largest independent NL ZZP ICT board. /nieuwste-freelance-ict-opdrachten/search/<keyword>/from/ returns real ZZP contracts. NL contract-native.

entries.name: freelancermap
entries.note: International IT freelance project marketplace, 915+ jobs. Infra category pages (/projects/infrastructure-management, /continuous-integration). RSS is enterprise-tier only.

entries.name: freelance.de
entries.note: DACH IT freelance marketplace, ICT top category, explicit Remote-Projekte filter. German-language, EU-remote usable.

entries.name: Freelancer.com
entries.note: PUBLICLY readable; real K8s/Terraform/AWS gigs. RATE-FLOOR MISMATCH: budgets $23-1195 / $43-51/hr — far below EUR 750/day. Included for completeness; rate-gate at sweep time.

entries.name: freelance.nl
entries.note: Largest NL ZZP assignment board; DevOps/Deployment-OPS/Linux categories, senior EUR 95-110/hr. Category pages public, individual opdrachten behind register → extension.

entries.name: Freep.nl
entries.note: NL ZZP/interim, government-focused. /zzp/devops-engineer shows 'IAM DevOps engineer' contracts (CJIB, Belastingdienst), avg EUR 101/hr. Detail behind register → extension.

entries.name: Hoofdkraan.nl
entries.note: NL freelance assignment marketplace. 'Beheer & Techniek' category but skews creative/web — lower lane density.

entries.name: CodersRank Jobs
entries.note: PUBLICLY readable, explicit Contract/Freelance/Remote filters. Sampled roles app-dev heavy — low infra density. Secondary.

keyless_feed_enrichment._note: Newly-verified keyless feeds. Some occupation-agnostic (backbone candidates), some lane/category-specific (discovery seed for tech lanes). 'already_backbone' marks the 3 already shipped — captured here for the verified category/contract query-param details that improve their poll_method.

entries.name: Jobicy
entries.note: Keyless JSON v2 API + RSS. job_types RSS param accepts 'contract'/'freelance' explicitly; geo/region accept netherlands/uk/germany/europe/emea. Real infra roles. Backbone candidate.

entries.name: JustJoin.it
entries.note: Keyless JSON, 10,079 totalItems. Per-offer workplaceType + employmentTypes[].type incl. 'b2b'/'permanent'/'mandate_contract', salary from/to + currency + unit, requiredSkills, city, multilocation. B2B = the contract lane. EU. High-value seed.

entries.name: Landing.jobs
entries.note: Keyless JSON. title/locations[]/remote(bool)/currency/gross_salary_low-high/tags/role_description/expires_at. HTML board has Contractor + 'Remote across borders' filters. EU. High-value seed.

entries.name: We Work Remotely (DevOps/Sysadmin category)
entries.note: Category-scoped RSS, tighter than the all-jobs feed. Items carry region/type/expiration; 'Contract' engagement filter exists. Improves the existing WWR backbone poll_method.

entries.name: Remotive
entries.note: category=devops IS accepted (contradicts the all-params-are-noops note for the category param specifically); job_type field carries contract values. Refine the existing Remotive backbone note.

entries.name: Working Nomads
entries.note: Already backbone. Confirmed live; 'Remote Contract jobs' + 'Development Contract Jobs' filters exist site-side.

entries.name: Himalayas
entries.note: Already backbone (api). RSS variant carries custom companyName/locationRestriction/timezoneRestriction fields — useful for EU/UK geo filtering. Add RSS endpoint to its poll_method.

entries.name: kube.careers
entries.note: Niche K8s/SRE board. Senior Platform/SRE/Staff DevOps roles, salary + remote flags. Lane-specific seed (not backbone — too niche to be occupation-agnostic).

entries.name: Arc.dev
entries.note: DevOps filter chip; explicit freelance roles with hourly rates + Staff SRE / Senior Linux. Lane-specific seed.

entries.name: 4dayweek.io
entries.note: SRE/Platform/Senior SRE roles. Skews FTE reduced-hours, weak freelance fit. Secondary seed.

entries.name: web3.career
entries.note: 885 DevOps jobs, k8s/aws/docker tags. Web3-sector niche, partial lane overlap. Secondary.

entries.name: Remote in Europe
entries.note: Curated EU board, DevOps/SysAdmin category. Mostly FTE, no contract filter. Secondary EU seed.

entries.name: Relocate.me
entries.note: DevOps/SRE category + Remote filter, EU destinations incl. NL. Relocation-centric, thin volume. Weak fit.

entries.name: ICTergezocht.nl
entries.note: Large NL IT-only board, 2,856 vacancies, System Engineering (270) + ICT Beheer (210) categories. FTE-skew, no ZZP filter surfaced. NL national seed.

entries.name: awesome-remote-job
entries.note: META-source: curated GitHub index linking further in-lane boards (DevOpsJobs, No Fluff Jobs, SwissDev Jobs). Use as an enumeration seed, not a listings feed.
